content_body: We were looking for a relaxing getaway from a hectic time in life. We booked the Happy Ours Lodge. Everything was top notch from the beautiful furnishings, the comfort of the beds, the fresh smell of the linens, the cleanliness of the cabin and the well stocked supplies. Above and beyond all of those wonderful aspects our favorite thing about this cabin was the view of the mountains, the gorgeous sunsets and the peaceful mountain mornings sitting on the back porch watching the fog lift as the sun rose. Happy Ours Lodge was just what we were looking for. Thank you Cabin Rentals of Georgia for making our relaxing long weekend seamless and wonderful.
title: Mountain Remedy for Hectic Times
